utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these sections. Each section is fully detailed: 
- property: includes name, address, bedrooms, bathrooms, school district, price, and currency—all necessary details.
- financing: includes purchase method, down payment, fees, interest rate, term, and documentation—all complete.
- legal_services: includes service name, cost, and currency—complete.
- moving_services: includes service level, cost, currency, and packing inclusion—complete.
- setup_services: includes utility package type, cost, currency, services included, and a property survey with cost—complete.
- total_budget: includes all cost components, breakdown, total, and currency—complete.
Thus, all 6 out of 6 required items are present and fully specified.
